achievements.title: Don't Turn RNG Off
achievements.description: Activate a Seeded run [DISCLAIMER: Using a Seed in a run pauses every other achievement]
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Rogue Journey has Started!
achievements.description: Complete your first run [Most achievements are linked to ingame quests, so make sure to unlock them first, have fun!]
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Spelunking Fossils
achievements.description: Get the 1st badge

achievements.description: Get the 2nd badge

achievements.title: Elite Master
achievements.description: Beat the Elite Four

achievements.title: The Champion
achievements.description: Defeat the Champion and clear the run
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Post Game Unlocked
achievements.description: Find the Secret Room (or win a full run and visit the HUB)
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Shop Spree
achievements.description: During one Rest Stop visit, spend at least 20000 PokeDollars
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Big Saver
achievements.description: Leave a Rest Stop with at least 50000 PokeDollars on hand
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Collector
achievements.description: Have 15 Pokedex entries
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Collector +
achievements.description: Have 100 Pokedex entries
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Collector X
achievements.description: Beat the Elite Four with a Legendary Pokemon in your party
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Can't Stop!
achievements.description: Exit a Tough Route within 2 minutes of entering
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Won't Stop!
achievements.description: Exit a Tough Route within 1 minute of entering (after getting the 8th Badge in current run)
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Care Tactics
achievements.description: Defeat four Gyms without having your Partner Pokemon faint
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Smart Tactics
achievements.description: Defeat the eight Gyms without having any Pokemon faint
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: True Tactics
achievements.description: Win a full Run without having any Pokemon faint
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Forager
achievements.description: Collect 10 different types of Berry in a run
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Wild Den
achievements.description: Catch a Pokemon inside the Strong Pokemon event space
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Mr. Randoman
achievements.description: Trade with Mr. Randoman
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Chaos Master
achievements.description: Win a full Run with doing Random Party Trades whenever possible
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Mystery Man
achievements.description: Say a phrase that unlocks an event from the Mysterious Man
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Fate
achievements.description: Lose a Pokemon to a wild Wobbuffet
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Mankey's Paw
achievements.description: Take a Dark Deal during the run
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: RogueLocke
achievements.description: Complete a Full Run with Bag Wipe active, trade at the start, and have the Embargo, Species, and 10 Wild Curses active
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Cursed Body
achievements.description: Take one of every available Curse and complete a Full run with them active
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Extreme Mode
achievements.description: Win a full Run with the Embargo Curse
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Hardcore Mode
achievements.description: Win a full Run on Hard trainer difficulty with the Embargo Curse
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Insane Mode
achievements.description: Win a full Run on Hard trainer difficulty without using Legendary Pokemon and having the Embargo and Species Curses
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Please Stop...
achievements.description: Win a full Run without using Legendary Pokemon and with: Hard trainers and items, Bag Wipe, EVs off, Overlevel off, trade at the start, and Embargo and Species Curses
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: True Mono
achievements.description: Complete a full Run with having 5 Capacity Curses active
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Iron Kaizo
achievements.description: Complete a full Run with Bag Wipe active, trade at the start, and have Embargo, 5 Capacity, 5 Wild, and 99 Discount Curses active

achievements.description: Complete a full Run in Gauntlet Mode

achievements.title: Mischief
achievements.description: Reach the final battle with a Hoopa in your party (Need Gen limit at least 6 or Regional Dex with Hoopa in it)
